title: Even More Crowns
body:
Bored of helmets? This pack replaces the golden, iron, diamond, netherite, and turtle helmets with crowns, as well as retexturing all armor trims to fit on these crowns.

## CHANGES
- Replace certain helmet models & item textures with crowns, including;
	- Iron
	- Gold
	- Diamond
	- Netherite
	- Turtle
- Tweaks certain trims to fit on the new crown models, including;
	- Dune
	- Raiser
	- Rib
	- Sentry (replaced with a gem, because it's fun)
	- Silence
	- Snout
	- Tide
	- Wild
    - Flow
    - Bolt
- Adds modified trim item texture for crowns
## COMPATABILITY
- 1.21
